zh.Pays de Caux, Upper Normandy, France: 法國豪-諾門迪帕斯 德 考
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Hugh Corbet於1020年之前出生在法國豪-諾門迪帕斯 德 考時，他的父親Roger Corbet64歲，母親Giovanna Dei Carnaghi11016歲。他於大約1045年與Isabella de Payes在法國結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1081年在他的家鄉，埋葬在法國諾門迪。

zh-hans.Pays de Caux, Upper Normandy, France: 法国豪-諾門迪帕斯 德 考
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Hugh Corbet于1020年之前出生在法国豪-諾門迪帕斯 德 考时，他的父亲Roger Corbet64岁，母亲Giovanna Dei Carnaghi11016岁。他于大约1045年与Isabella de Payes在法国结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1081年在他的家乡，埋葬在法国諾門迪。

nameMeanings.name: Corbet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: History: Walter Corbet, a royal knight in 12th-century Scotland, was the first of that name in that kingdom. His 13th-century descendants were major landholders in the Borders, and in the 14th century they acquired lands in the North of Scotland.

variants.name: Corbett
meanings: English (West Midlands, of Norman origin): nickname from Old French corbet ‘raven’, probably denoting someone with dark hair or a dark complexion.

History: This is the name of a family descended from Hugh Corbet, a Norman baron who settled in Shropshire following the Norman Conquest. One of his descendants, Sir Richard Corbet, was granted land near Shrewsbury in 1223; since the 13th century, this place has been known as Moreton Corbet. The name was taken from Shropshire to Scotland in the 12th century and to northern Ireland in the 17th century, and thence to North America by at least one group of bearers of the name.

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Hugh Corbet was born before 1020, in Pays de Caux, Upper Normandy, France, his father, Roger Corbet, was 64 and his mother, Giovanna Dei Carnaghi, was 11016. He married Isabella de Payes about 1045, in France. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1081, in his hometown, and was buried in Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Hugh Corbet est né avant 1020, à Pays de Caux, Haute-Normandie, France, son père, Roger Corbet, avait 64 ans et sa mère, Giovanna Dei Carnaghi, avait 11016 ans. Il a épousé Isabella de Payes environ 1045, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1081, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Hugh Corbet vor 1020 in Pays de Caux, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger Corbet 64 und seine Mutter Giovanna Dei Carnaghi 11016. Er hat um 1045 in Frankreich Isabella de Payes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1081 in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Hugh Corbet è nato il prima del 1020 nel Pays de Caux, Haute-Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Roger Corbet, aveva 64 anni e il suo madre, Giovanna Dei Carnaghi, aveva 11016 anni. Lui sposato Isabella de Payes circa 1045, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1081, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a Normandie, Francia.

ja.Normandy, France: フランスノーマンディ

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Hugh Corbetが1020年以前にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディペイズ ド カウックスで生まれた時，父Roger Corbetは64歳，母Giovanna Dei Carnaghiは11016歳であった。約1045年にフランスでIsabella de Payesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1081年に故郷で死去し，フランスノーマンディにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Hugh Corbet(이)가 1020년 이전 프랑스 하테-노먼디 파이스 데 카스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Corbet(은)는 64세였고, 그의 어머니 Giovanna Dei Carnaghi(은)는 11016세였다. 그는 대략 1045년 프랑스에서 Isabella de Payes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1081년 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 프랑스 노먼디에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Hugh Corbet nasceu antes 1020, em Pays de Caux, Haute-Normandie, França, seu pai, Roger Corbet, tinha 64 anos e sua mãe, Giovanna Dei Carnaghi, tinha 11016 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabella de Payes aproximadamente 1045, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1081, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Hugh Corbet родился перед 1020 г. в местности пеис де каукс, хауте-норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Roger Corbet было 64 года, а матери, которую звали Giovanna Dei Carnaghi, 11016. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabella de Payes около 1045 г. в местности Франция. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1081 г. в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности норманди, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Hugh Corbet nació antes de 1020, en Pays de Caux, Haute-Normandie, Francia, su papá, Roger Corbet, tenía 64 años y su mamá, Giovanna Dei Carnaghi, tenía 11016 años. Se casó con Isabella de Payes aproximadamente 1045, en Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1081, en su pueblo, y fue sepultado en Normandie, Francia.
